title: Agentic Workspace Context Authority Declaration
description: Authority and lifecycle declaration for one AW-consumed context surface class.

surface.description: AW-consumed surface or surface class being declared.

owner.description: Canonical owner for this operational input concern.

authority_class.description: Authority class that determines whether consumers may route, validate, or only cite this input.

consumer.description: AW consumer or capability that reads this surface.

activation.description: Task, path, or state condition that makes this surface applicable.

editable_by.description: Operation, generator, or owner allowed to mutate this surface.

stale_when.description: Freshness condition that invalidates the surface for routing or claims.

proof_route.description: Validation route that proves this surface is current and usable.

disposition.description: Retention, removal, archival, compression, or regeneration policy.
